Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course directly focuses on prosecutorial practice, the rule of law, judicial supervision, and accountability, which are fundamental to building strong, effective, and just institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course involves a clear partnership between the university and public institutions (Ministry of Justice, Judicial Yuan Academy) to build capacity in legal professionals (Targets 17.9, 17.17).
